However, this represents a defensive postu

signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaks $75,000 Following Iran Peace Signal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaks $75,000 Following Iran Peace Signal | YES | HIGH confidence**

Bitcoin has surged above $75,000 for the first time since mid-March after Iran signaled willingness to resume peace talks with the United States.[3] This represents a significant technical breakout, as the asset had been range-bound below $70,000 for over a month due to Middle East conflict pressures.[3]

signals.headline: Ethereum Outperforms with 8
signals.raw:
Ethereum Outperforms with 8.6% Jump to $2,377 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum rallied 8.6% to $2,377, outperforming all major tokens in the market recovery.[3] This move notably exceeds the bearish April predictions from Polymarket, which had priced an 96% probability of ETH trading below $2,000.[1]

signals.headline: Critical Catalysts Ahead:**
signals.raw:
Critical Catalysts Ahead:**
The rally faces three major tests over the next two weeks: the April 15 tax deadline (estimated $2.8 billion in crypto selling), the ceasefire expiry on April 22, and the FOMC meeting on April 28-29.[3]
